description_long: This object is a bamboo toothbrush accompanied by a rectangular cardboard box. The toothbrush features a light wooden handle with a smooth, natural finish and a slightly contoured shape for ergonomic grip. The bristle head is compact and densely packed with dark bristles, contrasting with the pale bamboo handle. The handle is inscribed with the word 'Caliquo,' suggesting a brand or model name. The cardboard box is a muted brown color, with printed text indicating it is a bamboo toothbrush and providing additional product information. The overall design is minimalist and eco-friendly, emphasizing sustainability and simplicity.
description: A bamboo toothbrush with a light wooden handle, dark bristles, and a matching cardboard box featuring printed product details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the toothbrush head and bristles facing forward, with the handle and box aligned side by side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of both the toothbrush and the cardboard box, with the bristles visible above the box.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the toothbrush head and handle, with the box's side and opening flap visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the full length of the toothbrush and the box, with the bristles and handle details clearly visible.
attribute_bristle_arrangement: The bristles are arranged in several straight, parallel rows forming a rectangular cluster, densely packed for effective cleaning. The bristle head appears flat and uniform, with no visible multi-level or angled features.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is straight with gentle curves for ergonomic grip, made from smooth, light-colored bamboo. It features a simple, natural finish with the brand name inscribed near the head.
